title: Implement real Facial identity gate and model provenance
operator_request: Facial’s identity gate is a backbone need for LoRA mining. MT-019 only records proxy identity keys, so real optional model-backed identity must be added without fake success states.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Model-backed identity is optional and configuration-driven. Never hardcode D: model paths; never emit match/verdict success unless the configured model was loaded and recorded with SHA-256 provenance.

scope.summary: Add optional real YuNet/ArcFace/PIPNet-backed identity analysis with model provenance, degraded no-model behavior, and LoRA-ready identity gate artifacts.
base_scope: Add model configuration discovery for detector/embedder/landmark assets without hardcoded absolute paths.
Implement no-model degraded path that is explicit and testable.
When configured, load model files through native Rust code and record model SHA-256, source family, thresholds, and version/config values.
Emit face boxes, detector confidence, face fraction, sharpness, yaw/landmark fields when available, embedding provenance, and identity gate verdicts.
Keep proxy fields from MT-019 only as fallback/degraded compatibility, never as real identity proof.
acceptance_criteria: No fake identity match verdicts are emitted in no-model mode.
identity_source becomes real only after configured model load succeeds.
Rows include model SHA-256, detector source, threshold, face box/frac/score, sharpness, yaw, and landmark-derived fields when available.
No D: or user-profile model path is hardcoded in product code or tests.
Real-model smoke tests are env-gated and skipped by default when model files are absent.
risks_and_controls: Risk: model dependency bloats build or breaks non-Windows targets. Control: keep model runtime optional/configured and test no-model path by default.
Risk: identity gate falsely rejects useful training data. Control: record thresholds and raw scores, keep decisions reversible, and avoid destructive actions.
Risk: provenance drift makes old artifacts unusable. Control: persist model hashes and config in every identity artifact.
verification: Model config validation and SHA-256 provenance tests.
Env-gated ignored smoke test for real local model assets when operator provides paths.

manual_requirement: Required if this MT exposes or changes operator/model-visible Facial behavior.

handoff.validation_note: MT-027 product commit pushed. Targeted backend, real ArcFace smoke, quality/dedupe, formatting, path-leak, and static route scans passed. Broad cargo check/manual cargo reruns had process-level inconclusive exits and are not claimed as passing.

summary: Added optional feature-gated native ArcFace ONNX identity runtime behind facial-onnx-runtime using tract-onnx.
Added configuration-driven model loading and SHA-256 provenance for identity model assets without hardcoded product paths.
Changed no-model behavior to explicit proxy_unverified/no-model records instead of fake identity match or no-match success states.
Added real-model identity rows with identity_source=real, model_backed=true, embedding hash/dimension provenance, and reversible unsure verdicts when no reference identity is configured.
Added runtime status/error buckets for feature-disabled, model-unavailable, no-local-image, load, image, embedding, and inference failure paths.
Updated Facial registry/run summaries so ArcFace is runtime-gated/model-backed instead of statically unavailable.
Updated the internal UserManual with identity_record, identity_model_sha256, identity_provenance, runtime_error_counts, and ArcFace env-gated operation notes.
scope_expansions: Cargo.lock was updated for optional tract-onnx dependency resolution.
facial_native/common.rs, registry.rs, and run.rs were updated after post-review found stale static ArcFace unavailable routing.
facial.rs and atelier_facial_quality_dedupe_tests.rs were updated so identity provenance is present in Facial analysis summaries and existing quality/dedupe tests remain compatible.
UserManual seed/tests were updated because MT-027 changes model/operator-visible Facial behavior.

passed: HANDSHAKE_TEST_FACIAL_ARCFACE_ONNX=<local Facial ArcFace model>; cargo test --features facial-onnx-runtime --test atelier_facial_identity_tests facial_identity_real_model_env_gate_smoke -- --ignored --exact --nocapture (1 passed; proves local_path_hint and source_ref-only local image paths)

Direct execution of the rebuilt user_manual_content_tests binary passed ckc_posekit_quickstart_is_native_first_and_reachable; manual anchor scan found identity_record, identity_model_sha256, identity_provenance, configured model hash provenance wording, runtime_error_counts, arcface_onnx_resize_112_v1, HANDSHAKE_FACIAL_ARCFACE_ONNX, and model_unavailable.
rustfmt --edition 2021 --check on MT-027 touched Rust files
git diff --check on MT-027 touched files
Scoped hardcoded path scan found no D:, C:/Users, LLM projects, facial/product, or CastKit-Codex leakage in MT-027 product files

Stale static ArcFace route scan found no identity.arcface_unavailable, identity_gate:arcface_embedding:arcface_model_not_configured, or native_onnx_identity_runtime_not_wired strings; remaining arcface_model_not_configured strings are legitimate no-model fallback reasons.
inconclusive: Final cargo check --lib rerun exited -1 immediately after Checking handshake_core with no rustc/cargo/link process left; no passing check verdict is claimed.

Final cargo rerun of the manual integration test exited -1 before test verdict; no Cargo manual rerun pass is claimed. Manual files were older than the previously rebuilt binary, direct binary execution passed, and anchor scan passed.

findings_addressed: Source-ref-only local image rows bypassed the real ArcFace runtime. Fixed identity path resolution to use local_path_hint first and source_ref local filesystem paths second; real ONNX smoke covers both paths.

ArcFace registry/run summary still advertised static unavailable routing after runtime implementation. Fixed registry/run/model summary wording and added assertions for runtime-gated model-backed ArcFace routing.
